overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a covered urban pedestrian walkway at night. The environment features neon lighting, digital billboards, graffiti-covered concrete walls, and a water canal, with various NPC pedestrians populating the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising and water feature

events.description: camera shifts to follow the muscular character in tank top more closely, moving toward the left side near the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor following a muscular character wearing a tank top and sunglasses

notable_agents.action: muscular man in gray tank top and sunglasses walking ahead of the camera
person standing near the water canal railing looking out over the water

entered.detail: industrial metal beam ceiling structure with exposed girders
large illuminated screen displaying animated content on the right wall
water feature running parallel to the walkway on the left side
concrete barrier separating walkway from the water canal
concrete wall covered with various graffiti tags and street art
illuminated LED strips running along the edges of the walkway floor

segments.scene_description: The video opens in a covered cyberpunk pedestrian walkway at night, following a muscular character in a tank top. The corridor features a water canal on the left, digital billboards on the right, and neon floor lighting. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction as the camera walks forward through the industrial concrete environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vending machines and prominent graffiti art

events.description: Insta-Food vending machine becomes visible on the left wall
large graffiti mural of a face with text becomes prominent on the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor, passing the vending machine and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket and bright red pants walking toward the camera
person in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: red and blue vending machine with 'Insta-Food' branding and colorful display
large black and white street art depicting a face with text reading 'FEED THE MACHINE'

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the corridor as an Insta-Food vending machine comes into view on the left. The digital billboards switch to car advertisements, and a large graffiti mural dominates the right wall. The camera passes a woman in red pants and other pedestrians while maintaining a steady pace through the neon-lit walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with continuous digital advertising displays

events.description: digital billboards transition to displaying cityscape and architectural imagery

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the corridor passing multiple pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: woman in brown jacket and white pants walking toward the camera

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with the large mural now passed. The digital billboards display cityscape imagery while the crowd density increases slightly. The vending machine recedes into the distance on the left as the camera maintains a steady walking pace through the consistently lit neon environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching intersection or exit point

events.description: digital billboard changes to display heart symbol and 'Kiroshi' text

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the end of the corridor section, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with bright green hair, red top, and holding a green umbrella walking toward camera
man in checkered shirt standing near the water canal railing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward the end of the walkway section, with the digital billboards now displaying a heart symbol. A distinctive pedestrian with green hair and an umbrella passes by, and the corridor appears to open up ahead. The environment maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic with consistent neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk pedestrian walkway that gradually transitions from a sparse industrial corridor to a more crowded urban thoroughfare. It begins by following a muscular character past a water canal and digital billboards, moving through a concrete environment illuminated by neon floor lighting. As the camera advances, the scene shifts to reveal an Insta-Food vending machine and a large graffiti mural on the right wall, passing a woman in red pants while the billboards switch to car advertisements. The perspective then continues forward as the mural recedes and the billboards transition to cityscape imagery, with the crowd density increasing slightly. Finally, the camera approaches the end of the walkway where the billboards display a heart symbol and a pedestrian with green hair and an umbrella passes by just as the corridor begins to open up.
